name: Eggplant and Bocconcini Tart with Rocket
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Rocket leaves, trimmed and tossed with a little vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine all ingredients except polenta. Add 1/4 cup ice-cold water and process for about 15 seconds or until the mixture just comes together.
2. Roll out the mixture on a surface sprinkled with polenta to form a round about 3 cm thick and 32 cm in diameter.
3. Place the tart on an oven tray, turning over a 1 cm edge to create a rim. Cover and freeze for 20 minutes.
4. Remove from the freezer and sprinkle Gruyere cheese over the surface. Top with bocconcini and eggplant slices. Brush lightly with olive oil and season to taste.
5. Bake at 200°C (392°F) for 45 minutes.
6. Top with rocket leaves and cut into wedges to serve.
